pub_name: RK Beach Shack Bar & Nightlife Zone
walking_direction_steps: Start at RK Beach main promenade near the volleyball courts. Walk north along the beach path towards Submarine Museum. Pass the INS Kurusura Submarine on your left. The bar zone is right beside the Submarine Museum entrance on Ramakrishna Beach Road.
